mapper.select: SELECT * FROM class_schedule WHERE room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY start_time DESC
SELECT * FROM class_schedule WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY start_time
SELECT * FROM class_schedule WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND status IN (1, 2) AND NOW() BETWEEN DATE_SUB(start_time, INTERVAL 30 MINUTE) AND end_time ORDER BY start_time LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO class_schedule (class_name, coach_name, class_type, room_id, start_time, end_time, capacity, status, description) VALUES (#{className}, #{coachName}, #{classType}, #{roomId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{capacity}, #{status}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE class_schedule SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
